description:
Introductions:
Give your floor and furniture the best protection with this PVC Matte Home-use Protective Mat for Floor Chair. It will bring your life a lot of benefits. This mat can effectively block the surface of objects and reduce the scratches when your furniture is moving on the floor. The matte surface can increase the frictional force and avoid slipping. Superior PVC material makes it durable and reliable for long-lasting use. The reasonable price is suitable for each clever shopper who focuses on quality and price.

 

Features:
1. Give your floor and furniture the best protection
2. This mat can effectively block the surface of objects and reduce the scratches when your furniture is moving on the floor
3. The matte surface can increase the frictional force and avoid slipping
4. Superior PVC material makes it durable and reliable for long-lasting use
5. The reasonable price is suitable for each clever shopper who focuses on quality and price

 

Specifications:
1. Color: Transparent
2. Material: PVC
3. Occasions: Home Use
4. Dimensions: (47.36 x 35.35 x 0.06)" / (120.3 x 89.8 x 0.15)cm (L x W x H)
5. Weight: 63.49oz / 1800g
6. This mat is smooth on one side and grinding on the other. When your floor is smooth, please use the grinding side facing down. If your floor has texture, please use the smooth side facing down
7. Because of long-term transportation and weather changes, the mat is irregular when it is just taken out. Please iron it with boiled water, and then put the mat down and press it with heavy objects for 3-5 days. The mat will be smooth

Package Includes:
1 x Scrub the Floor to Protect Mat Chair Cushion
